expectations.text: The main component is broken down into smaller, logical sub-components.
expectations.evidence: Created HeroBackground, HeroBadge, HeroContent, HeroActions, HeroStats, and HeroScrollIndicator sub-components.

expectations.text: The refactored code uses clsx and tailwind-merge for class management.
expectations.evidence: Utilized the existing 'cn' utility for class management.

expectations.text: The component preserves all original sections (Badge, Title, Subtitle, CTA, Stats).
expectations.evidence: Maintained all original sections by extracting them into sub-components.
